tasks.title: Refactor cps-init to WebFetch cps_scaffold.py from GitHub main at runtime
tasks.description: Eliminate the 'rebundle cps-init.skill on scaffold edit' house rule by having cps-init pull cps_scaffold.py (and the .ps1/.cmd wrappers) from raw.githubusercontent.com at install time, same pattern as cps-patcher's catalog fetch. Removes one of two remaining rebundle disciplines. Requires the recovery helper pattern to be proven first so we share the fetch+verify code path.

tasks.title: Distribute .skill bundles via GitHub Releases instead of hand-delivery
tasks.description: Tag CPS versions (v8.7, v8.8...) and attach .skill files as release assets. cps-patcher / cps-setup can then fetch the latest skill bundles directly from the release, decoupling skill updates from the manual rebundle+present_files cycle. Downstream projects get current skills without Shane hand-delivering each one. Larger scope — design the release cadence and which skills ship where.
